name: test-harmonyos-apps
description: Test HarmonyOS and OpenHarmony apps with device workflows for reproduction, screenshots, UI inspection, and hilog capture.

interface.shortDescription: Reproduce issues, inspect UI, and capture evidence from HarmonyOS devices
interface.longDescription: Use Test HarmonyOS Apps to build and install HAP variants, drive a connected HarmonyOS or OpenHarmony device with hdc shell commands, inspect dumpLayout UI trees, capture screenshots, and collect hilog output while reproducing issues.
defaultPrompt: Use Test HarmonyOS Apps to reproduce a device issue with hdc, then capture screenshots, UI state, and hilog
